message:
Fix isReranking state not being reset in SpotlightSearch

This commit fixes a UI state management bug where the isReranking flag
could remain true in certain edge cases, causing visual inconsistencies
in the search interface.

The bug occurred when:
1. User clears the search query (empty string case)
2. Semantic mode is disabled but reranking was previously active
3. The effect cleanup runs before reranking completes

Fixed by adding setIsReranking(false) calls in three places:
- When query is empty/whitespace (early return path)
- When semantic mode is disabled (non-reranking code path)
- In the cleanup function (when effect is cancelled)

This ensures the loading indicator properly disappears regardless of
how the search operation terminates, improving UX responsiveness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
